summary: Comprehensive testing of Statistics Page P1 feature. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified working correctly with real data from database.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/statistics - returns overview, monthly, by_program, by_status, by_age_group data
Backend: GET /api/statistics?period_type=month - defaults to current month (March 2026)
Backend: GET /api/statistics?period_type=school_year&year=2025 - returns Sep 2025 - Jun 2026 data
Backend: GET /api/statistics?period_type=semester&semester=1 - first semester Sep-Jan
Backend: GET /api/statistics?period_type=semester&semester=2 - second semester Feb-Jun
Backend: GET /api/statistics?period_type=calendar_year - calendar year Jan-Dec
Backend: Statistics overview contains all required metrics (bookings, students, teachers, visitors)
Backend: Statistics by_program returns program breakdown
Backend: Statistics by_status returns Czech status labels
Backend: Statistics by_age_group returns age group breakdown
Backend: Statistics monthly returns month-by-month data for period
Backend: Statistics requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/statistics/export/csv?export_type=summary - CSV with monthly summary
Backend: GET /api/statistics/export/csv?export_type=reservations - CSV with all reservations
Backend: GET /api/statistics/export/csv?export_type=programs - CSV with program breakdown
Backend: CSV export with period filters works correctly
Backend: CSV export returns 400 for invalid export type
Backend: CSV export requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/settings/pro - returns plan, is_pro, csv_export_exception flags
Backend: CSV export allowed with csv_export_exception=true despite free plan
Backend: GET /api/statistics/bookings-over-time - legacy endpoint working
Backend: GET /api/statistics/popular-programs - legacy endpoint working
Frontend: Period filter dropdown shows month, school year, semester, calendar year options
Frontend: Year selector shows school year format (2025/2026) for school_year period
Frontend: Semester selector appears when Pololetí period selected
Frontend: Overview cards display total bookings (3), students (70), teachers (6), visitors (76)
Frontend: Status cards show confirmed (1), pending (2), completed (0), cancelled (0)
Frontend: Line chart shows reservation trend with Rezervace and Žáci lines
Frontend: Bar chart shows popular programs (Historická prohlídka, Test Program)
Frontend: Pie chart shows status distribution (33% Potvrzené, 67% Čekající)
Frontend: Bar chart shows age group distribution (MŠ, SŠ, ZŠ 1. stupeň)
Frontend: Average group size card shows 23.3 žáků
Frontend: Export buttons enabled when csv_export_exception=true
Frontend: Export CSV downloads successfully with toast notification
Frontend: PRO banner hidden when csv_export_exception=true
Frontend: Empty state shows 'Žádná data pro vybrané období' when no data
critical_code_review_comments: Statistics API properly filters by institution_id - data isolation working
Period calculations (school year, semester) correctly handle year transitions
CSV export properly checks PRO plan OR csv_export_exception flag before allowing export
All date calculations use timezone-aware datetime objects
Monthly data excludes cancelled reservations for accurate counts
Frontend isPro check includes csv_export_exception: response.data?.is_pro || response.data?.csv_export_exception
Charts use Recharts library with proper ResponsiveContainer wrapping
All data-testid attributes present for key elements
seed_data_creation: Test data exists in March 2026: 3 reservations (1 confirmed, 2 pending), 70 students, 6 teachers, 2 programs (Historická prohlídka, Test Program), 3 age groups
context_for_next_testing_agent: Statistics page fully tested with real data. Test account: demo@budezivo.cz / Demo2026!. Institution Test Muzeum has csv_export_exception=true (free plan but can export CSV). Test data for March 2026: 3 reservations. Period filters (month, school_year, semester, calendar_year) all working. CSV export (summary, reservations, programs) all working. All 4 chart types (line, bar, pie, bar for age groups) rendering correctly.

backend_endpoints.get_statistics: PASS - Returns all required data sections
backend_endpoints.pro_status: PASS - Returns plan and exception flags

frontend_components.year_selector: PASS - Shows school year format when appropriate
frontend_components.line_chart: PASS - Trend rezervací with monthly data
frontend_components.export_buttons: PASS - Enabled when isPro or exception

csv_export_verification.programs_format: Program;Počet rezervací;Počet žáků;Počet pedagogů;Celkem návštěvníků;Průměrná velikost skupiny
